typescript-to-json.title: TypeScript to JSON
typescript-to-json.description: Convert TypeScript object/array literals into JSON.
typescript-to-json.configDescription: Convert TypeScript object/array literals into JSON.
typescript-to-json.cardInputDescription: Paste TypeScript code containing an object or array literal.
typescript-to-json.invalidInput: Input must contain a valid TypeScript object/array literal
typescript-to-json.cardOutputDescription: Review and copy the converted JSON output.
